widget.name: Event Background
widget.description: Events widget but runs even if the tab isn't focused

property.caption: Debug mode
property.description: When enabled, the widget attempting to execute the action will be logged to the browser console as an Info log. Disable prior to committing!

property.caption: On Load Action
property.description: Event ran on render after the delay number of milliseconds. Use this - instead of the standard Events widget - if the event should execute even if the browser tab is inactive
